channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The next Mac Studio and MacBook Pro releases could be postponed by several months
item.description: Anyone looking to upgrade to the next Mac Studio or MacBook Pro might have to wait a little longer, thanks to the ongoing global memory shortage. As reported by Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, "at least two of the company's upcoming machines ... could debut a little later than the company initially planned," referencing the refreshes to Apple's desktop and its laptop that's expected to get a touchscreen. Bloomberg reported that the upcoming Mac Studio, which follows up the current lineup in the M4 Max and M3 Ultra configurations, was first expected to release in the middle of the year. However, Apple...

item.title: Ce nouvel aspirateur robot laveur Ecovacs qui traque la saleté à l’infrarouge profite de 150 € de remise pour une durée limitée
item.description: L'Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone est un aspirateur-robot laveur haut de gamme qui embarque une nouvelle technologie : l'infrarouge pour détecter les taches les plus tenaces. Vous le retrouvez à 1 249 euros sur Amazon au lieu de 1 399 euros.

item.title: Meilleurs aspirateurs robots pas chers (2026) : notre top 6 à partir de 170 €
item.description: Un petit aspirateur robot vous ferait de l'œil, mais vous n'avez pas envie de dépenser des mille et des cents dans ce type d'appareil ? Bienvenue sur notre comparatif des meilleurs robots aspirateurs pas chers à acheter.

item.title: I tested the Ultion Nuki 2025: the most well-rounded smart lock in the UK for ultimate peace of mind
item.description: it removes the friction that has traditionally made smart locks feel like more effort than they’re worth.

item.title: Palantir posts mini-manifesto denouncing inclusivity and ‘regressive’ cultures
item.description: Palantir's ideological bent has come under more scrutiny as it's worked with ICE and positioned itself as a defender of "the West."

item.title: 'They are not human': Why AI has 'predictable and systematic biases' when it comes to judging people
item.description: AI systems simulate human trust using structured models, producing consistent decisions that differ from human intuition and show stronger demographic biases.

item.title: Tesla is rolling out its Robotaxi service to Dallas and Houston
item.description: Tesla is expanding its Robotaxi footprint across Texas by introducing availability in both Dallas and Houston. As announced in a post on X, the EV maker is rolling out its Robotaxis to small sections of the Texas cities, as detailed by two maps of its new service areas. The first Robotaxi rides started in Austin, Texas where Tesla is headquartered, but the service's launch was paired with a "Tesla Safety Monitor," or a supervising human in the passenger seat. Earlier this year, Tesla began to transition away from including safety monitors, leaving its Robotaxis to operate unsupervised and ful...

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Uber enters its assetmaxxing era
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

item.title: Devolo Magic 2 WiFi 6 next: a combination powerline and Wi-Fi kit for tackling Wi-Fi deadspots
item.description: There are less expensive options, but the versatile connectivity features of the Devolo Magic 2 WiFi 6 next could be the perfect solution for some homes and office.

item.title: iPhone 17e vs Samsung Galaxy S25 FE : comment choisir le meilleur smartphone premium accessible ?
item.description: L'iPhone 17e et le Galaxy S25 FE de Samsung sont des rivaux évidents. Mais, indépendamment de vos préférences envers iOS ou Android, comment se défendent-ils sur la partie technique ? On les compare pour vous aider à choisir !
